app_wrapper.instruction: Apply this inline style to the outermost wrapper (e.g. div with min-h-screen). Remove classes like bg-gray-50, bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-500 to-green-500, or from-orange-50 to-red-50.

headers.instruction: Replace existing solid or gradient backgrounds from <header>. Use this transparent dark styling. Ensure header text and icons use the gold (#f6d488) or body text color.

cards.css: background: linear-gradient(160deg, #0c1a3d, #0a1430); border: 1px solid rgba(246,166,35,0.4); box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.4); border-radius: 1rem;
cards.instruction: Update all <Card> components. Remove bg-white, bg-neutral-900/95. Apply this gradient and gold border inline.

primary_buttons.css: background: linear-gradient(160deg, #ffe08a, #f6a623); color: #08122e; border: none; box-shadow: 0 10px 26px rgba(246,166,35,0.35); border-radius: 9999px; font-weight: 800;
primary_buttons.instruction: Update main CTAs (login, add to cart, submit order). Replace bg-blue-500, bg-orange-500, etc. Apply the gold gradient pill with dark text using inline styles.

secondary_buttons.css: background: transparent; border: 1px solid rgba(246,166,35,0.5); color: #f6a623; border-radius: 9999px;
secondary_buttons.instruction: For outline or ghost buttons, use transparent background with gold border and gold text.

inputs.css: background: rgba(10, 19, 48, 0.6); border: 1px solid rgba(246,166,35,0.4); color: #ffffff;
inputs.instruction: Make input backgrounds dark, border gold, and text white. Remove bg-white or default borders.

status_colors.instruction: Keep green ONLY for positive accept/success (delivered, accept call, completed). Use gold/yellow for pending/preparing. Use red for cancelled. Convert solid badges to dark-theme compatible: e.g., 'delivered' -> bg-green-500/20 text-green-400 border border-green-500/30, 'pending' -> bg-yellow-500/20 text-yellow-400 border border-yellow-500/30.

incoming_call_screen.instruction: Update the `incomingOrder` overlay in DriverApp.js. Use `background: linear-gradient(160deg, #0c1a3d, #0a1430); border: 1px solid rgba(246,166,35,0.5)` for the modal. 'Accept' button MUST BE GREEN (bg-green-600). 'Dismiss' button outline gold.

tracking_timeline.instruction: Update icons and lines in tracking timeline to use gold for active steps, and muted navy/grey for inactive.

instructions_to_main_agent: Identify all top-level wrappers (e.g., `min-h-screen`) in DriverApp.js and CustomerMenu.js and apply the radial-gradient inline style.
Update all `<Card>` and `<CardContent>` to use the dark navy gradient (`#0c1a3d` to `#0a1430`) with the gold border (`rgba(246,166,35,0.4)`).
Replace primary action buttons (Login, Submit Order, Add to Cart) with the gold pill gradient style and dark text (`#08122e`).
Refactor typography colors: set base text to `#cfd6ea` and headings/accents to `#f6d488`.
Ensure the green color (`#10b981` or `bg-green-500`) is preserved strictly for 'success', 'delivered', or 'accept' actions.
Remove all references to `from-orange-500 to-red-500` or `from-blue-500 to-green-500` in headers, cards, and buttons.
Ensure `data-testid` attributes are preserved on interactive elements. Add `data-testid` if missing on interactive elements.
Be careful to preserve existing logic (state, API calls, hooks) - only touch the visual Tailwind classes and inline styles.
